########## Abrade ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Zone
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.DealDamageEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetPermanent


/**
 * Abrade
 * {1}{R}
 * Instant
 * Choose one —
 * • Abrade deals 3 damage to target creature.
 * • Destroy target artifact.
 */
val Abrade = card("Abrade") {
    manaCost = "{1}{R}"
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "Choose one —\n• Abrade deals 3 damage to target creature.\n• Destroy target artifact."
    spell {
        modal(chooseCount = 1) {
            mode("Abrade deals 3 damage to target creature") {
                val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
                effect = DealDamageEffect(3, t)
            }
            mode("Destroy target artifact") {
                val t = target("target", TargetPermanent(filter = TargetFilter.Artifact))
                effect = Effects.Move(t, Zone.GRAVEYARD, byDestruction = true)
            }
        }
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "139"
        artist = "Dominik Mayer"
        flavorText = "The Falkenrath progenitor was a vicious falconer, and the line is quick to remind others of its heritage."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/f/e/fee393c7-1868-4d11-93c3-3d143e0c8dd9.jpg"
    }
}

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Aim High
 * {1}{G}
 * Instant
 * Untap target creature. It gets +2/+2 and gains reach until end of turn.
 */
val AimHigh = card("Aim High") {
    manaCost = "{1}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "Untap target creature. It gets +2/+2 and gains reach until end of turn."
    spell {
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = Effects.Composite(
            Effects.Untap(t),
            Effects.ModifyStats(2, 2, t),
            Effects.GrantKeyword(Keyword.REACH, t)
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "185"
        artist = "Steve Prescott"
        flavorText = "\"A slayer gets by on wits and reflexes.\"\n—Higa, slayer-captain of Gatstaf"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/b/2/b28dbf2c-9bfe-42be-be55-1e7fb523df36.jpg"
    }
}

########## Ancestral Anger ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Zone
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.DrawCardsEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.references.Player
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.values.DynamicAmount


/**
 * Ancestral Anger
 * {R}
 * Sorcery
 * Target creature gains trample and gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is 1 plus the number of cards named Ancestral Anger in your graveyard.
 * Draw a card.
 */
val AncestralAnger = card("Ancestral Anger") {
    manaCost = "{R}"
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"
    oracleText = "Target creature gains trample and gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is 1 plus the number of cards named Ancestral Anger in your graveyard.\nDraw a card."
    spell {
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = Effects.Composite(
            Effects.GrantKeyword(Keyword.TRAMPLE, t),
            Effects.ModifyStats(
                DynamicAmount.Add(
                    DynamicAmount.Fixed(1),
                    DynamicAmount.Count(Player.You, Zone.GRAVEYARD, GameObjectFilter.Any.named("Ancestral Anger"))
                ),
                DynamicAmount.Fixed(0),
                t
            ),
            DrawCardsEffect(1)
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "141"
        artist = "Randy Vargas"
        flavorText = "\"One vampire for every family member I've lost.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/e/e/eeaca66d-23bd-4e8f-8d4a-c5864dd447be.jpg"
    }
}

########## Angelfire Ignition ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Counters
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.KeywordAbility
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.AddCountersEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Angelfire Ignition
 * {1}{R}{W}
 * Sorcery
 * Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. It gains vigilance, trample, lifelink, indestructible, and haste until end of turn.
 * Flashback {2}{R}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
 */
val AngelfireIgnition = card("Angelfire Ignition") {
    manaCost = "{1}{R}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "WR"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"
    oracleText = "Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. It gains vigilance, trample, lifelink, indestructible, and haste until end of turn.\nFlashback {2}{R}{W} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)"
    spell {
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = Effects.Composite(
            AddCountersEffect(counterType = Counters.PLUS_ONE_PLUS_ONE, count = 2, target = t),
            Effects.GrantKeyword(Keyword.VIGILANCE, t),
            Effects.GrantKeyword(Keyword.TRAMPLE, t),
            Effects.GrantKeyword(Keyword.LIFELINK, t),
            Effects.GrantKeyword(Keyword.INDESTRUCTIBLE, t),
            Effects.GrantKeyword(Keyword.HASTE, t)
        )
    }
    keywordAbility(KeywordAbility.flashback("{2}{R}{W}"))
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "229"
        artist = "Yeong-Hao Han"
        flavorText = "\"My angel is the flint, and I am her steel.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/8/4/84ec79d8-c8de-46be-9d82-5e6bd5de9cad.jpg"
    }
}

 * Sorcery

 * Exile target artifact, creature, or enchantment.
 */

    manaCost = "{2}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "W"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"
    oracleText = "As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a permanent.\nExile target artifact, creature, or enchantment."
    additionalCost(Costs.additional.SacrificePermanent(GameObjectFilter.Permanent))
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: target:TargetPermanent

        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "9"
        artist = "Zezhou Chen"

########## Apothecary Geist ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Subtype
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Conditions
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.GainLifeEffect


/**
 * Apothecary Geist
 * {3}{W}
 * Creature — Spirit
 * 2/3
 * Flying
 * When this creature enters, if you control another Spirit, you gain 3 life.
 */
val ApothecaryGeist = card("Apothecary Geist") {
    manaCost = "{3}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "W"
    typeLine = "Creature — Spirit"
    oracleText = "Flying\nWhen this creature enters, if you control another Spirit, you gain 3 life."
    power = 2
    toughness = 3
    keywords(Keyword.FLYING)
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.EntersBattlefield
        triggerCondition = Conditions.YouControl(GameObjectFilter.Creature.withSubtype(Subtype.SPIRIT))
        effect = GainLifeEffect(3)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "10"
        artist = "Franz Vohwinkel"
        flavorText = "For some customers, the old apothecary shop still opens its doors."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/a/7/a79df1a1-6d60-4e5f-b4d8-668155836bb6.jpg"
    }
}

########## Avacyn, Angel of Hope ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GrantKeyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.GroupFilter


/**
 * Avacyn, Angel of Hope
 * {5}{W}{W}{W}
 * Legendary Creature — Angel
 * 8/8
 * Flying, vigilance, indestructible
 * Other permanents you control have indestructible.
 */
val AvacynAngelOfHope = card("Avacyn, Angel of Hope") {
    manaCost = "{5}{W}{W}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "W"
    typeLine = "Legendary Creature — Angel"
    oracleText = "Flying, vigilance, indestructible\nOther permanents you control have indestructible."
    power = 8
    toughness = 8
    keywords(Keyword.FLYING, Keyword.VIGILANCE, Keyword.INDESTRUCTIBLE)
    staticAbility {
        ability = GrantKeyword(
            Keyword.INDESTRUCTIBLE,
            GroupFilter(GameObjectFilter.Permanent.youControl(), excludeSelf = true)
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.MYTHIC
        collectorNumber = "477"
        artist = "Jason Chan"
        flavorText = "A golden helix streaked skyward from the Helvault. A thunderous explosion shattered the silver monolith and Avacyn emerged, free from her prison at last."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/7/4/74e5dcec-ef1d-4461-bb23-61d98ff082dd.jpg"

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Avacynian Priest
 * {1}{W}
 * Creature — Human Cleric
 * 1/2
 * {1}, {T}: Tap target non-Human creature.
 */
val AvacynianPriest = card("Avacynian Priest") {
    manaCost = "{1}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "W"
    typeLine = "Creature — Human Cleric"
    oracleText = "{1}, {T}: Tap target non-Human creature."
    power = 1
    toughness = 2
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Mana("{1}"), Costs.Tap)
        val t = target(
            "target",
            TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter(GameObjectFilter.Creature.notSubtype(Subtype("Human"))))
        )
        effect = Effects.Tap(t)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "12"
        artist = "Greg Staples"
        flavorText = "Moorlanders speak in awe of the priests' talent for arriving just in time to drive off the wicked things that prowl the ravished parish."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/c/1/c119b314-c563-4b6b-8bac-a680e69c6b37.jpg"

 * 3/3
 * Flying
 * Other Spirit creatures you control get +1/+0.

    toughness = 3

            powerBonus = 1,
            toughnessBonus = 0,

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Blood Mist
 * {3}{R}
 * Enchantment
 * At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gains double strike until end of turn.
 */
val BloodMist = card("Blood Mist") {
    manaCost = "{3}{R}"
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Enchantment"
    oracleText = "At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gains double strike until end of turn."
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.BeginCombat
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature.youControl()))
        effect = Effects.GrantKeyword(Keyword.DOUBLE_STRIKE, t)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "143"
        artist = "Joseph Meehan"
        flavorText = "\"Some claim that rage is a cloud that obscures thought and vision. But I can assure you—I've never seen with greater clarity.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/2/c/2c01ef93-f41a-406f-91fc-f015b6014575.jpg"
    }
}

########## Bloodmad Vampire ##########
// TODO: GENERATED DRAFT — incomplete render, do NOT merge as-is. Finish the STRUCTURE stub(s) below.
// Source: mtgish IR via the coverage bridge (predictive, approximate).

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Counters
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.AddCountersEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Bloodmad Vampire
 * {2}{R}
 * Creature — Vampire Berserker
 * 4/1
 * Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.
 * Madness {1}{R} (If you discard this card, discard it into exile. When you do, cast it for its madness cost or put it into your graveyard.)
 */
val BloodmadVampire = card("Bloodmad Vampire") {
    manaCost = "{2}{R}"
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Creature — Vampire Berserker"
    oracleText = "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.\nMadness {1}{R} (If you discard this card, discard it into exile. When you do, cast it for its madness cost or put it into your graveyard.)"
    power = 4
    toughness = 1
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.DealsCombatDamageToPlayer
        effect = AddCountersEffect(counterType = Counters.PLUS_ONE_PLUS_ONE, count = 1, target = EffectTarget.Self)
    }
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: Madness
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "145"
        artist = "Johannes Voss"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/8/a/8a9747c1-ef2c-4c61-9529-abfb6ae0f964.jpg"
    }

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity


/**
 * Bound by Moonsilver
 * {2}{W}
 * Enchantment — Aura
 * Enchant creature
 * Enchanted creature can't attack, block, or transform.
 * Sacrifice another permanent: Attach this Aura to target creature. Activate only as a sorcery and only once each turn.
 */

    manaCost = "{2}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "W"
    typeLine = "Enchantment — Aura"

        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "13"

########## Captivating Vampire ##########
// TODO: GENERATED DRAFT — incomplete render, do NOT merge as-is. Finish the STRUCTURE stub(s) below.
// Source: mtgish IR via the coverage bridge (predictive, approximate).
// Before use: (1) finish the STRUCTURE stub(s), (2) write & pass a scenario test, (3) review the rules text.
// Then move into the set's cards/ package (auto-registers via classpath scan).

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Subtype
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.ModifyStats
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.GroupFilter


/**
 * Captivating Vampire
 * {1}{B}{B}
 * Creature — Vampire
 * 2/2
 * Other Vampire creatures you control get +1/+1.
 * Tap five untapped Vampires you control: Gain control of target creature. It becomes a Vampire in addition to its other types.
 */
val CaptivatingVampire = card("Captivating Vampire") {
    manaCost = "{1}{B}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "B"
    typeLine = "Creature — Vampire"
    oracleText = "Other Vampire creatures you control get +1/+1.\nTap five untapped Vampires you control: Gain control of target creature. It becomes a Vampire in addition to its other types."
    power = 2
    toughness = 2
    staticAbility {
        ability = ModifyStats(
            powerBonus = 1,
            toughnessBonus = 1,
            filter = GroupFilter(
                GameObjectFilter.Creature.withSubtype(Subtype.VAMPIRE).youControl(),
                excludeSelf = true
            )
        )
    }
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: GainControlOfPermanent
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "100"
        artist = "Eric Deschamps"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/0/f/0f87aadf-7638-4691-b5a5-86f928e98462.jpg"
    }
}

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetPermanent


/**
 * Cathar Commando
 * {1}{W}
 * Creature — Human Soldier
 * 3/1
 * Flash
 * {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment.
 */
val CatharCommando = card("Cathar Commando") {
    manaCost = "{1}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "W"
    typeLine = "Creature — Human Soldier"
    oracleText = "Flash\n{1}, Sacrifice this creature: Destroy target artifact or enchantment."
    power = 3
    toughness = 1
    keywords(Keyword.FLASH)
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Mana("{1}"), Costs.SacrificeSelf)
        val t = target("target", TargetPermanent(filter = TargetFilter.ArtifactOrEnchantment))
        effect = Effects.Move(t, Zone.GRAVEYARD, byDestruction = true)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "15"
        artist = "Evyn Fong"
        flavorText = "\"Honorable tactics are for honorable foes. These werewolves are preying on innocent travelers. I'll stab them in the back while they sleep if I have to.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/7/c/7cd21530-ca72-4986-a0f2-142b9f23c413.jpg"

########## Cathars' Crusade ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Counters
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.TriggerBinding
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.AddCountersEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.GroupFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Cathars' Crusade
 * {3}{W}{W}
 * Enchantment
 * Whenever a creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.
 */
val CatharsCrusade = card("Cathars' Crusade") {
    manaCost = "{3}{W}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "W"
    typeLine = "Enchantment"
    oracleText = "Whenever a creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control."
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.entersBattlefield(
            filter = GameObjectFilter.Creature.youControl(),
            binding = TriggerBinding.ANY
        )
        effect = Effects.ForEachInGroup(
            GroupFilter(GameObjectFilter.Creature.youControl()),
            AddCountersEffect(Counters.PLUS_ONE_PLUS_ONE, 1, EffectTarget.Self)
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "17"
        artist = "Karl Kopinski"
        flavorText = "Avacyn's holy warriors kept hope alive in her darkest hours. Now they will carry that hope across Innistrad."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/5/2/5296e353-2efc-4d72-a877-7957eff630b9.jpg"
    }
}

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.GroupFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Chittering Host
 * Creature — Eldrazi Horror
 * 5/6
 * Haste
 * Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
 * When this creature enters, other creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain menace until end of turn.
 */
val ChitteringHost = card("Chittering Host") {
    manaCost = ""
    colorIdentity = "B"
    typeLine = "Creature — Eldrazi Horror"
    oracleText = "Haste\nMenace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)\nWhen this creature enters, other creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain menace until end of turn."
    power = 5
    toughness = 6
    keywords(Keyword.HASTE, Keyword.MENACE)
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.EntersBattlefield
        effect = Effects.ForEachInGroup(
            GroupFilter(GameObjectFilter.Creature.youControl(), excludeSelf = true),
            Effects.Composite(
                Effects.ModifyStats(1, 0, EffectTarget.Self),
                Effects.GrantKeyword(Keyword.MENACE, EffectTarget.Self)
            )
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "123b"
        artist = "Jason Felix"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/6/0/607d82bd-13b1-499a-9005-0381e716013a.jpg"

########## Clear Shot ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.DynamicAmounts
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.DealDamageEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Clear Shot
 * {2}{G}
 * Instant
 * Target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. It deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control.
 */
val ClearShot = card("Clear Shot") {
    manaCost = "{2}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "Target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn. It deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control."
    spell {
        val t1 = target("t1", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature.youControl()))
        val t2 = target("t2", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature.youControl()))
        effect = Effects.Composite(
            Effects.ModifyStats(1, 1, t1),
            DealDamageEffect(DynamicAmounts.targetPower(0), t2, damageSource = t1)
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "188"
        artist = "Craig J Spearing"
        flavorText = "As werewolf attacks increased, brutal weapons not seen since the Travails were dusted off and put to work."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/8/8/88b8905b-68d3-491b-b7fe-eed74841e9a0.jpg"
    }
}

    manaCost = "{U}"
    colorIdentity = "U"
    typeLine = "Creature — Zombie Horse"

    toughness = 3

########## Cobbled Wings ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GrantKeyword


/**
 * Cobbled Wings
 * {2}
 * Artifact — Equipment
 * Equipped creature has flying.
 * Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)
 */
val CobbledWings = card("Cobbled Wings") {
    manaCost = "{2}"
    colorIdentity = ""
    typeLine = "Artifact — Equipment"
    oracleText = "Equipped creature has flying.\nEquip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)"
    staticAbility {
        ability = GrantKeyword(Keyword.FLYING)
    }
    equipAbility("{1}")
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "258"
        artist = "Matt Stewart"
        flavorText = "For the necro-alchemist, any puzzle can be solved with intelligence and harvested body parts."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/e/8/e8bb16f6-71b2-4338-a546-27f37f50e811.jpg"
    }
}

/**

 * Sorcery
 * Escalate—Discard a card. (Pay this cost for each mode chosen beyond the first.)
 * Choose one or more —
 * • Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose an instant or sorcery card from it. That player discards that card.
 * • Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.
 * • Target opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
 */

    manaCost = "{1}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "B"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"

You choose an instant or sorcery card from it. That player discards that card.\n• Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.\n• Target opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life."

        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "101"

 * Sorcery

 * • Target player discards all the cards in their hand, then draws that many cards.
 * • Collective Defiance deals 4 damage to target creature.
 * • Collective Defiance deals 3 damage to target opponent or planeswalker.

    manaCost = "{1}{R}{R}"
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"

########## Craterhoof Behemoth ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.GroupFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.references.Player
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.values.DynamicAmount


/**
 * Craterhoof Behemoth
 * {5}{G}{G}{G}
 * Creature — Beast
 * 5/5
 * Haste
 * When this creature enters, creatures you control gain trample and get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of creatures you control.
 */
val CraterhoofBehemoth = card("Craterhoof Behemoth") {
    manaCost = "{5}{G}{G}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Creature — Beast"
    oracleText = "Haste\nWhen this creature enters, creatures you control gain trample and get +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of creatures you control."
    power = 5
    toughness = 5
    keywords(Keyword.HASTE)
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.EntersBattlefield
        effect = Effects.ForEachInGroup(
            GroupFilter(GameObjectFilter.Creature.youControl()),
            Effects.Composite(
                Effects.GrantKeyword(Keyword.TRAMPLE, EffectTarget.Self),
                Effects.ModifyStats(
                    DynamicAmount.AggregateBattlefield(Player.You, GameObjectFilter.Creature),
                    DynamicAmount.AggregateBattlefield(Player.You, GameObjectFilter.Creature),
                    EffectTarget.Self
                )
            )
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.MYTHIC
        collectorNumber = "480"
        artist = "Chris Rahn"
        flavorText = "Its footsteps of today are the lakes of tomorrow."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/7/7/777bb4ba-a821-4a83-a9e2-8827e7eff98f.jpg"
    }
}

 * Creature — Human Soldier
 * 0/0
 * Crusader of Odric's power and toughness are each equal to the number of creatures you control.

    colorIdentity = "W"

########## Cryptolith Rite ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.AbilityId
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.ActivatedAbility
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GrantActivatedAbility
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.TimingRule
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.GroupFilter


/**
 * Cryptolith Rite
 * {1}{G}
 * Enchantment
 * Creatures you control have "{T}: Add one mana of any color."
 */
val CryptolithRite = card("Cryptolith Rite") {
    manaCost = "{1}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Enchantment"
    oracleText = "Creatures you control have \"{T}: Add one mana of any color.\""
    staticAbility {
        ability = GrantActivatedAbility(
            ability = ActivatedAbility(
                id = AbilityId.generate(),
                cost = Costs.Tap,
                effect = Effects.AddManaOfChoice(),
                isManaAbility = true,
                timing = TimingRule.ManaAbility
            ),
            filter = GroupFilter(GameObjectFilter.Creature.youControl())
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "189"
        artist = "Zack Stella"
        flavorText = "The chant was incomprehensible, but its power was unmistakable."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/0/a/0a4e707f-b760-434d-ba97-a0fe651f3f6a.jpg"
    }
}

 * Cultivator Colossus
 * {4}{G}{G}{G}
 * Creature — Plant Beast
 * 0/0
 * Trample
 * Cultivator Colossus's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands you control.
 * When this creature enters, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. If you do, draw a card and repeat this process.
 */
val CultivatorColossus = card("Cultivator Colossus") {
    manaCost = "{4}{G}{G}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Creature — Plant Beast"
    oracleText = "Trample\nCultivator Colossus's power and toughness are each equal to the number of lands you control.\nWhen this creature enters, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped. If you do, draw a card and repeat this process."
    power = 0
    toughness = 0
    keywords(Keyword.TRAMPLE)
    dynamicStats(DynamicAmount.AggregateBattlefield(Player.You, GameObjectFilter.Land))
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: RepeatableActions
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.MYTHIC
        collectorNumber = "190"
        artist = "Antonio José Manzanedo"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/4/2/426ed66e-41b3-4e44-90a2-697aafaa8c5c.jpg"

########## Dauntless Cathar ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Color
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Zone
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.TimingRule


/**
 * Dauntless Cathar
 * {2}{W}
 * Creature — Human Soldier
 * 3/2
 * {1}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying. Activate only as a sorcery.
 */
val DauntlessCathar = card("Dauntless Cathar") {
    manaCost = "{2}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "W"
    typeLine = "Creature — Human Soldier"
    oracleText = "{1}{W}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying. Activate only as a sorcery."
    power = 3
    toughness = 2
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Mana("{1}{W}"), Costs.ExileSelf)
        effect = Effects.CreateToken(
            power = 1,
            toughness = 1,
            colors = setOf(Color.WHITE),
            creatureTypes = setOf("Spirit"),
            keywords = setOf(Keyword.FLYING)
        )
        timing = TimingRule.SorcerySpeed
        activateFromZone = Zone.GRAVEYARD
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "19"
        artist = "Zack Stella"
        flavorText = "\"The harder they try to extinguish my faith, the brighter it burns in the darkness.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/b/6/b680d42c-8198-43b0-b934-2add08a02bbc.jpg"
    }
}

########## Dawnhart Disciple ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Subtype
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.TriggerBinding
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Dawnhart Disciple
 * {1}{G}
 * Creature — Human Warlock
 * 2/2
 * Whenever another Human you control enters, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
 */
val DawnhartDisciple = card("Dawnhart Disciple") {
    manaCost = "{1}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Creature — Human Warlock"
    oracleText = "Whenever another Human you control enters, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn."
    power = 2
    toughness = 2
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.entersBattlefield(
            filter = GameObjectFilter.Creature.withSubtype(Subtype.HUMAN).youControl(),
            binding = TriggerBinding.OTHER
        )
        effect = Effects.ModifyStats(1, 1, EffectTarget.Self)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "191"
        artist = "Mila Pesic"
        flavorText = "\"Our coven finds strength in nature and purpose in serving our communities.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/4/4/4463b28a-c2c9-4cbf-951e-e3ce6b1f14cb.jpg"
    }
}

########## Deadly Allure ##########
// TODO: GENERATED DRAFT — incomplete render, do NOT merge as-is. Finish the STRUCTURE stub(s) below.
// Source: mtgish IR via the coverage bridge (predictive, approximate).
// Before use: (1) finish the STRUCTURE stub(s), (2) write & pass a scenario test, (3) review the rules text.
// Then move into the set's cards/ package (auto-registers via classpath scan).

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity


/**
 * Deadly Allure
 * {B}
 * Sorcery
 * Target creature gains deathtouch until end of turn and must be blocked this turn if able.
 * Flashback {G} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
 */
val DeadlyAllure = card("Deadly Allure") {
    manaCost = "{B}"
    colorIdentity = "BG"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"
    oracleText = "Target creature gains deathtouch until end of turn and must be blocked this turn if able.\nFlashback {G} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)"
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: CreatePermanentRuleEffectUntil
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "103"
        artist = "Steve Argyle"

########## Drogskol Shieldmate ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.GroupFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Drogskol Shieldmate
 * {2}{W}
 * Creature — Spirit Soldier
 * 2/3
 * Flash
 * When this creature enters, other creatures you control get +0/+1 until end of turn.
 */
val DrogskolShieldmate = card("Drogskol Shieldmate") {
    manaCost = "{2}{W}"
    colorIdentity = "W"
    typeLine = "Creature — Spirit Soldier"
    oracleText = "Flash\nWhen this creature enters, other creatures you control get +0/+1 until end of turn."
    power = 2
    toughness = 3
    keywords(Keyword.FLASH)
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.EntersBattlefield
        effect = Effects.ForEachInGroup(
            GroupFilter(GameObjectFilter.Creature.youControl(), excludeSelf = true),
            Effects.ModifyStats(0, 1, EffectTarget.Self)
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "20"
        artist = "Nils Hamm"
        flavorText = "\"I will join you so that you will not yet join me.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/b/a/ba94ea90-66e5-4fd2-80fd-4baec5f8a1e4.jpg"
    }
}

########## Drunau Corpse Trawler ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Color
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Drunau Corpse Trawler
 * {3}{U}
 * Creature — Zombie
 * 1/1
 * When this creature enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.
 * {2}{B}: Target Zombie gains deathtouch until end of turn.
 */
val DrunauCorpseTrawler = card("Drunau Corpse Trawler") {
    manaCost = "{3}{U}"
    colorIdentity = "UB"
    typeLine = "Creature — Zombie"
    oracleText = "When this creature enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.\n{2}{B}: Target Zombie gains deathtouch until end of turn."
    power = 1
    toughness = 1
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.EntersBattlefield
        effect = Effects.CreateToken(
            power = 2,
            toughness = 2,
            colors = setOf(Color.BLACK),
            creatureTypes = setOf("Zombie")
        )
    }
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Mana("{2}{B}")
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter(GameObjectFilter.Creature.withSubtype("Zombie"))))
        effect = Effects.GrantKeyword(Keyword.DEATHTOUCH, t)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "63"
        artist = "Dave Kendall"
        flavorText = "Seagrafs yield an abundance of resources for stitchers and ghoulcallers alike."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/1/1/11b29a06-c1e1-4d81-ac50-906c94617abe.jpg"
    }
}

########## Edgar's Awakening ##########
// TODO: GENERATED DRAFT — incomplete render, do NOT merge as-is. Finish the STRUCTURE stub(s) below.
// Source: mtgish IR via the coverage bridge (predictive, approximate).
// Before use: (1) finish the STRUCTURE stub(s), (2) write & pass a scenario test, (3) review the rules text.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Zone
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetObject


/**
 * Edgar's Awakening
 * {3}{B}{B}
 * Sorcery
 * Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.
 * When you discard this card, you may pay {B}. When you do, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.
 */
val EdgarsAwakening = card("Edgar's Awakening") {
    manaCost = "{3}{B}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "B"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"
    oracleText = "Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.\nWhen you discard this card, you may pay {B}. When you do, return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand."
    spell {
        val t = target("target", TargetObject(filter = TargetFilter.CreatureInYourGraveyard))
        effect = Effects.Move(t, Zone.BATTLEFIELD, fromZone = Zone.GRAVEYARD)
    }
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: FromAnyZone
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "108"
        artist = "Joshua Raphael"
        flavorText = "\"Here you go. Can't have you sleeping through your own wedding day.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/b/2/b2ff8b0a-f424-4a8d-a682-848bf1f3b07b.jpg"
    }

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity


/**
 * Elder Deep-Fiend
 * {8}
 * Creature — Eldrazi Octopus
 * 5/6
 * Flash
 * Emerge {5}{U}{U} (You may cast this spell by sacrificing a creature and paying the emerge cost reduced by that creature's mana value.)
 * When you cast this spell, tap up to four target permanents.
 */
val ElderDeepFiend = card("Elder Deep-Fiend") {
    manaCost = "{8}"
    colorIdentity = "U"
    typeLine = "Creature — Eldrazi Octopus"
    oracleText = "Flash\nEmerge {5}{U}{U} (You may cast this spell by sacrificing a creature and paying the emerge cost reduced by that creature's mana value.)\nWhen you cast this spell, tap up to four target permanents."
    power = 5
    toughness = 6
    keywords(Keyword.FLASH)
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: Emerge
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "4"
        artist = "Jason Felix"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/1/0/10532d06-94e3-47bc-a036-7535be05be98.jpg"
    }
}

########## Eldritch Evolution ##########
// TODO: GENERATED DRAFT — incomplete render, do NOT merge as-is. Finish the STRUCTURE stub(s) below.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter


/**
 * Eldritch Evolution
 * {1}{G}{G}
 * Sorcery
 * As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature.
 * Search your library for a creature card with mana value X or less, where X is 2 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value. Put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Exile Eldritch Evolution.
 */
val EldritchEvolution = card("Eldritch Evolution") {
    manaCost = "{1}{G}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"
    oracleText = "As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature.\nSearch your library for a creature card with mana value X or less, where X is 2 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value. Put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Exile Eldritch Evolution."
    additionalCost(Costs.additional.SacrificePermanent(GameObjectFilter.Creature))
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: SearchLibrary
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "195"
        artist = "Jason Rainville"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/6/0/606caf13-c0d3-4a61-9a1a-32f13b6448ab.jpg"
    }
}

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity


/**
 * Emrakul, the Promised End
 * {13}
 * Legendary Creature — Eldrazi
 * 13/13
 * This spell costs {1} less to cast for each card type among cards in your graveyard.
 * When you cast this spell, you gain control of target opponent during that player's next turn. After that turn, that player takes an extra turn.
 * Flying, trample, protection from instants
 */
val EmrakulThePromisedEnd = card("Emrakul, the Promised End") {
    manaCost = "{13}"
    colorIdentity = ""
    typeLine = "Legendary Creature — Eldrazi"
    oracleText = "This spell costs {1} less to cast for each card type among cards in your graveyard.\nWhen you cast this spell, you gain control of target opponent during that player's next turn. After that turn, that player takes an extra turn.\nFlying, trample, protection from instants"
    power = 13
    toughness = 13
    keywords(Keyword.FLYING, Keyword.TRAMPLE)
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: 
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.MYTHIC
        collectorNumber = "5"
        artist = "Jaime Jones"
        flavorText = "An enigma as vexing as life itself."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/7/1/71911392-42b0-4b6d-baf7-918a4bd3b924.jpg"
    }
}

########## Epitaph Golem ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Zone
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.ZonePlacement
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetObject


/**
 * Epitaph Golem
 * {5}
 * Artifact Creature — Golem
 * 3/5
 * {2}: Put target card from your graveyard on the bottom of your library.
 */
val EpitaphGolem = card("Epitaph Golem") {
    manaCost = "{5}"
    colorIdentity = ""
    typeLine = "Artifact Creature — Golem"
    oracleText = "{2}: Put target card from your graveyard on the bottom of your library."
    power = 3
    toughness = 5
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Mana("{2}")
        val t = target(
            "target",
            TargetObject(filter = TargetFilter(GameObjectFilter.Any.ownedByYou(), zone = Zone.GRAVEYARD))
        )
        effect = Effects.Move(t, Zone.LIBRARY, ZonePlacement.Bottom)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "262"
        artist = "Adam Paquette"
        flavorText = "Many names and many memories bound together in grim purpose."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/2/0/202125f5-9182-436f-86df-701cdc7e60ce.jpg"
    }
}

########## Evolving Wilds ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Patterns
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.SearchDestination


/**
 * Evolving Wilds
 * Land
 * {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
 */
val EvolvingWilds = card("Evolving Wilds") {
    manaCost = ""
    colorIdentity = ""
    typeLine = "Land"
    oracleText = "{T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle."
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Tap, Costs.SacrificeSelf)
        effect = Patterns.Library.searchLibrary(
            filter = GameObjectFilter.BasicLand,
            destination = SearchDestination.BATTLEFIELD,
            entersTapped = true
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "278"
        artist = "Cliff Childs"
        flavorText = "\"Our world is vast, but Thraben is its heart. The cathedral must stand even if the hinterlands are lost.\"\n—Thalia, Knight-Cathar"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/e/3/e3056678-4ef0-4847-af08-df218ef5fb2b.jpg"
    }
}

########## Faithless Looting ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Patterns
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.KeywordAbility
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.DrawCardsEffect


/**
 * Faithless Looting
 * {R}
 * Sorcery
 * Draw two cards, then discard two cards.
 * Flashback {2}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
 */
val FaithlessLooting = card("Faithless Looting") {
    manaCost = "{R}"
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"
    oracleText = "Draw two cards, then discard two cards.\nFlashback {2}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)"
    spell {
        effect = Effects.Composite(
            DrawCardsEffect(2),
            Patterns.Hand.discardCards(2)
        )
    }
    keywordAbility(KeywordAbility.flashback("{2}{R}"))
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "151"
        artist = "Gabor Szikszai"
        flavorText = "\"Avacyn has abandoned us! We have nothing left except what we can take!\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/5/2/52e47757-0aa9-48b0-8b43-e2483d7eed67.jpg"
    }
}

 * 2/1

 */

    manaCost = "{R}"
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Creature — Vampire Berserker"

    power = 2
    toughness = 1

        rarity = Rarity.RARE

        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/1/6/16c376f5-f69b-49d4-95f4-92bdd68c564c.jpg"

########## Festival Crasher ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Festival Crasher
 * {1}{R}
 * Creature — Devil
 * 1/3
 * Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.
 */
val FestivalCrasher = card("Festival Crasher") {
    manaCost = "{1}{R}"
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Creature — Devil"
    oracleText = "Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn."
    power = 1
    toughness = 3
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.YouCastInstantOrSorcery
        effect = Effects.ModifyStats(2, 0, EffectTarget.Self)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "153"
        artist = "Milivoj Ćeran"
        flavorText = "So many candles. So many flammables. So little time."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/d/8/d8d050c1-ae0c-46c1-8aa7-7cde4606105b.jpg"
    }
}

########## Fiery Temper ##########
// TODO: GENERATED DRAFT — incomplete render, do NOT merge as-is. Finish the STRUCTURE stub(s) below.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.DealDamageEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.AnyTarget


/**
 * Fiery Temper
 * {1}{R}{R}
 * Instant
 * Fiery Temper deals 3 damage to any target.
 * Madness {R} (If you discard this card, discard it into exile. When you do, cast it for its madness cost or put it into your graveyard.)
 */
val FieryTemper = card("Fiery Temper") {
    manaCost = "{1}{R}{R}"
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "Fiery Temper deals 3 damage to any target.\nMadness {R} (If you discard this card, discard it into exile. When you do, cast it for its madness cost or put it into your graveyard.)"
    spell {
        val t = target("target", AnyTarget())
        effect = DealDamageEffect(3, t)
    }
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: Madness
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "154"
        artist = "Johannes Voss"
        flavorText = "\"Let the flames ignore the sinless.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/1/d/1d3a3a1d-c393-4a57-8a0e-5907d1722331.jpg"
    }
}

########## Forbidden Alchemy ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Patterns
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.KeywordAbility


/**
 * Forbidden Alchemy
 * {2}{U}
 * Instant
 * Look at the top four cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.
 * Flashback {6}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
 */
val ForbiddenAlchemy = card("Forbidden Alchemy") {
    manaCost = "{2}{U}"
    colorIdentity = "UB"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "Look at the top four cards of your library. Put one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.\nFlashback {6}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)"
    spell {
        effect = Patterns.Library.lookAtTopAndKeep(count = 4, keepCount = 1)
    }
    keywordAbility(KeywordAbility.flashback("{6}{B}"))
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "65"
        artist = "David Rapoza"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/c/1/c179a72e-2956-43d3-810c-7eeca8d3ab0d.jpg"

########## Furyblade Vampire ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Patterns
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.IfYouDoEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.MayEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Furyblade Vampire
 * {1}{R}
 * Creature — Vampire Berserker
 * 1/2
 * Trample
 * At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may discard a card. If you do, this creature gets +3/+0 until end of turn.
 */
val FurybladeVampire = card("Furyblade Vampire") {
    manaCost = "{1}{R}"
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Creature — Vampire Berserker"
    oracleText = "Trample\nAt the beginning of combat on your turn, you may discard a card. If you do, this creature gets +3/+0 until end of turn."
    power = 1
    toughness = 2
    keywords(Keyword.TRAMPLE)
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.BeginCombat
        effect = MayEffect(
            effect = IfYouDoEffect(
                action = Patterns.Hand.discardCards(1),
                ifYouDo = Effects.ModifyStats(3, 0, EffectTarget.Self)
            )
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "155"
        artist = "Lius Lasahido"
        flavorText = "\"Writhe all you want, filth. It will do you no good.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/9/5/95a38a53-d83a-4df7-8caa-40995b0c4235.jpg"
    }
}

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.DealDamageEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Geistcatcher's Rig
 * {6}
 * Artifact Creature — Construct
 * 4/5
 * When this creature enters, you may have it deal 4 damage to target creature with flying.
 */
val GeistcatchersRig = card("Geistcatcher's Rig") {
    manaCost = "{6}"
    colorIdentity = ""
    typeLine = "Artifact Creature — Construct"
    oracleText = "When this creature enters, you may have it deal 4 damage to target creature with flying."
    power = 4
    toughness = 5
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.EntersBattlefield
        optional = true
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature.withKeyword(Keyword.FLYING)))
        effect = DealDamageEffect(4, t)
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "264"
        artist = "Vincent Proce"
        flavorText = "The rigs were outlawed except in Nephalia, where malign spirits are as plentiful as crazed inventors."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/0/b/0b8f741c-919e-457d-8a02-c7282c1305ec.jpg"
    }
}

########## Geistlight Snare ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.ManaCost
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Subtype
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.CostModification
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.CostReductionSource
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.ModifySpellCost
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.SpellCostTarget
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.CounterCondition
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.effects.CounterEffect
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetSpell


/**
 * Geistlight Snare
 * {2}{U}
 * Instant
 * This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control a Spirit. It also costs {1} less to cast if you control an enchantment.
 * Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}.
 */
val GeistlightSnare = card("Geistlight Snare") {
    manaCost = "{2}{U}"
    colorIdentity = "U"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "This spell costs {1} less to cast if you control a Spirit. It also costs {1} less to cast if you control an enchantment.\nCounter target spell unless its controller pays {3}."
    staticAbility {
        ability = ModifySpellCost(
            target = SpellCostTarget.SelfCast,
            modification = CostModification.ReduceGenericBy(
                CostReductionSource.FixedIfControlFilter(
                    amount = 1,
                    filter = GameObjectFilter.Creature.withSubtype(Subtype.SPIRIT)
                )
            )
        )
    }
    staticAbility {
        ability = ModifySpellCost(
            target = SpellCostTarget.SelfCast,
            modification = CostModification.ReduceGenericBy(
                CostReductionSource.FixedIfControlFilter(amount = 1, filter = GameObjectFilter.Enchantment)
            )
        )
    }
    spell {
        val t = target("target", TargetSpell())
        effect = CounterEffect(condition = CounterCondition.UnlessPaysMana(ManaCost.parse("{3}")))
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "66"
        artist = "Anato Finnstark"
        flavorText = "Tamil had always wanted a closer look at a geist's lantern. Now he had an eternity to study one."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/2/9/293511f6-09c2-4311-a2a6-0b0b7ef65bef.jpg"
    }
}

// TODO: GENERATED DRAFT — incomplete render, do NOT merge as-is. Finish the STRUCTURE stub(s) below.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Color
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity


/**
 * Gisa's Bidding
 * {2}{B}{B}
 * Sorcery
 * Create two 2/2 black Zombie creature tokens.
 * Madness {2}{B} (If you discard this card, discard it into exile. When you do, cast it for its madness cost or put it into your graveyard.)
 */
val GisasBidding = card("Gisa's Bidding") {
    manaCost = "{2}{B}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "B"
    typeLine = "Sorcery"
    oracleText = "Create two 2/2 black Zombie creature tokens.\nMadness {2}{B} (If you discard this card, discard it into exile. When you do, cast it for its madness cost or put it into your graveyard.)"
    spell {
        effect = Effects.CreateToken(
            power = 2,
            toughness = 2,
            colors = setOf(Color.BLACK),
            creatureTypes = setOf("Zombie"),
            count = 2
        )
    }
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: Madness
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "111"
        artist = "Jason Felix"
        flavorText = "\"Soft dirt makes for light work.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/5/a/5ad2fdbf-4a68-42e8-9c4f-7a075261ddf8.jpg"
    }
}

########## Grapple with the Past ##########
// TODO: GENERATED DRAFT — incomplete render, do NOT merge as-is. Finish the STRUCTURE stub(s) below.
// Source: mtgish IR via the coverage bridge (predictive, approximate).
// Before use: (1) finish the STRUCTURE stub(s), (2) write & pass a scenario test, (3) review the rules text.
// Then move into the set's cards/ package (auto-registers via classpath scan).

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity


/**
 * Grapple with the Past
 * {1}{G}
 * Instant
 * Mill three cards, then you may return a creature or land card from your graveyard to your hand. (To mill three cards, put the top three cards of your library into your graveyard.)
 */
val GrappleWithThePast = card("Grapple with the Past") {
    manaCost = "{1}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Instant"
    oracleText = "Mill three cards, then you may return a creature or land card from your graveyard to your hand. (To mill three cards, put the top three cards of your library into your graveyard.)"

    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.COMMON
        collectorNumber = "199"
        artist = "Howard Lyon"
        flavorText = "Emrakul does not grant wishes. Desires simply align to her will."

 * Legendary Creature — Zombie Warrior
 * 5/5
 * Grimgrin enters tapped and doesn't untap during your untap step.
 * Sacrifice another creature: Untap Grimgrin and put a +1/+1 counter on it.
 * Whenever Grimgrin attacks, destroy target creature defending player controls, then put a +1/+1 counter on Grimgrin.
 */

    manaCost = "{3}{U}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "UB"
    typeLine = "Legendary Creature — Zombie Warrior"

    toughness = 5

########## Gryff's Boon ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Zone
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Targets
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GrantKeyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.ModifyStats
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.TimingRule
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Gryff's Boon
 * {W}
 * Enchantment — Aura
 * Enchant creature
 * Enchanted creature gets +1/+0 and has flying.
 * {3}{W}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield attached to target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.
 */
val GryffsBoon = card("Gryff's Boon") {
    manaCost = "{W}"
    colorIdentity = "W"
    typeLine = "Enchantment — Aura"
    oracleText = "Enchant creature\nEnchanted creature gets +1/+0 and has flying.\n{3}{W}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield attached to target creature. Activate only as a sorcery."
    auraTarget = Targets.Creature
    staticAbility {
        ability = ModifyStats(1, 0)
    }
    staticAbility {
        ability = GrantKeyword(Keyword.FLYING)
    }
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Mana("{3}{W}")
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = Effects.Move(EffectTarget.Self, Zone.BATTLEFIELD, fromZone = Zone.GRAVEYARD)
        timing = TimingRule.SorcerySpeed
        activateFromZone = Zone.GRAVEYARD
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "25"
        artist = "Svetlin Velinov"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/a/0/a01e7a3f-9654-4f72-8adc-20dad0b5d14e.jpg"
    }
}

########## Hamlet Captain ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Subtype
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Triggers
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.GroupFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.EffectTarget


/**
 * Hamlet Captain
 * {1}{G}
 * Creature — Human Warrior
 * 2/2
 * Whenever this creature attacks or blocks, other Humans you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.
 */
val HamletCaptain = card("Hamlet Captain") {
    manaCost = "{1}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Creature — Human Warrior"
    oracleText = "Whenever this creature attacks or blocks, other Humans you control get +1/+1 until end of turn."
    power = 2
    toughness = 2
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.Attacks
        effect = Effects.ForEachInGroup(
            GroupFilter(GameObjectFilter.Creature.withSubtype(Subtype.HUMAN).youControl(), excludeSelf = true),
            Effects.ModifyStats(1, 1, EffectTarget.Self)
        )
    }
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.Blocks
        effect = Effects.ForEachInGroup(
            GroupFilter(GameObjectFilter.Creature.withSubtype(Subtype.HUMAN).youControl(), excludeSelf = true),
            Effects.ModifyStats(1, 1, EffectTarget.Self)
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "201"
        artist = "Wayne Reynolds"
        flavorText = "\"I would fear this fight, bloodsucker, were I alone.\""
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/0/6/06e5d76a-0cec-40e0-b694-2b5c8484f6c0.jpg"
    }
}

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.TimingRule
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Hanweir Battlements
 * Land
 * {T}: Add {C}.
 * {R}, {T}: Target creature gains haste until end of turn.
 * {3}{R}{R}, {T}: If you both own and control this land and a creature named Hanweir Garrison, exile them, then meld them into Hanweir, the Writhing Township.
 */
val HanweirBattlements = card("Hanweir Battlements") {
    manaCost = ""
    colorIdentity = "R"
    typeLine = "Land"
    oracleText = "{T}: Add {C}.\n{R}, {T}: Target creature gains haste until end of turn.\n{3}{R}{R}, {T}: If you both own and control this land and a creature named Hanweir Garrison, exile them, then meld them into Hanweir, the Writhing Township."
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Tap
        effect = Effects.AddColorlessMana(1)
        manaAbility = true
        timing = TimingRule.ManaAbility
    }
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Mana("{R}"), Costs.Tap)
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature))
        effect = Effects.GrantKeyword(Keyword.HASTE, t)
    }
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: If
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "279"
        artist = "Vincent Proce"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/8/c/8c0acb91-edfc-43a5-af77-6614327fce43.jpg"
    }
}

/**
 * Haunted Dead
 * {3}{B}
 * Creature — Zombie
 * 2/2
 * When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying.
 * {1}{B}, Discard two cards: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.
 */
val HauntedDead = card("Haunted Dead") {
    manaCost = "{3}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "B"
    typeLine = "Creature — Zombie"
    oracleText = "When this creature enters, create a 1/1 white Spirit creature token with flying.\n{1}{B}, Discard two cards: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped."
    power = 2
    toughness = 2
    triggeredAbility {
        trigger = Triggers.EntersBattlefield
        effect = Effects.CreateToken(
            power = 1,
            toughness = 1,
            colors = setOf(Color.WHITE),
            creatureTypes = setOf("Spirit"),
            keywords = setOf(Keyword.FLYING)
        )
    }
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: activated-cost
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "116"
        artist = "Lake Hurwitz"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/4/9/49fae417-c4f4-478c-86c4-83094306b8d4.jpg"

########## Heartless Summoning ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.CostModification
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.ModifySpellCost
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.ModifyStats
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.SpellCostTarget
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.GroupFilter


/**
 * Heartless Summoning
 * {1}{B}
 * Enchantment
 * Creature spells you cast cost {2} less to cast.
 * Creatures you control get -1/-1.
 */
val HeartlessSummoning = card("Heartless Summoning") {
    manaCost = "{1}{B}"
    colorIdentity = "B"
    typeLine = "Enchantment"
    oracleText = "Creature spells you cast cost {2} less to cast.\nCreatures you control get -1/-1."
    staticAbility {
        ability = ModifySpellCost(
            target = SpellCostTarget.YouCast(GameObjectFilter.Creature),
            modification = CostModification.ReduceGeneric(2)
        )
    }
    staticAbility {
        ability = ModifyStats(
            powerBonus = -1,
            toughnessBonus = -1,
            filter = GroupFilter(GameObjectFilter.Creature.youControl())
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE

// TODO: GENERATED DRAFT — incomplete render, do NOT merge as-is. Finish the STRUCTURE stub(s) below.
// Source: mtgish IR via the coverage bridge (predictive, approximate).
// Before use: (1) finish the STRUCTURE stub(s), (2) write & pass a scenario test, (3) review the rules text.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Costs
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.Effects
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.TargetFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.targets.TargetCreature


/**
 * Helvault
 * {3}
 * Legendary Artifact
 * {1}, {T}: Exile target creature you control.
 * {7}, {T}: Exile target creature you don't control.
 * When Helvault is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, return all cards exiled with it to the battlefield under their owners' control.
 */
val Helvault = card("Helvault") {
    manaCost = "{3}"
    colorIdentity = ""
    typeLine = "Legendary Artifact"
    oracleText = "{1}, {T}: Exile target creature you control.\n{7}, {T}: Exile target creature you don't control.\nWhen Helvault is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, return all cards exiled with it to the battlefield under their owners' control."
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Mana("{1}"), Costs.Tap)
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature.youControl()))
        effect = Effects.Exile(t)
    }
    activatedAbility {
        cost = Costs.Composite(Costs.Mana("{7}"), Costs.Tap)
        val t = target("target", TargetCreature(filter = TargetFilter.Creature.youControl()))
        effect = Effects.Exile(t)
    }
    // STRUCTURE needs human wiring: PutEachExiledCardOntoTheBattlefield
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.RARE
        collectorNumber = "266"
        artist = "Jaime Jones"
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/c/3/c3aae385-4307-4574-9284-c52787dca5fe.jpg"
    }
}

########## Howlpack Resurgence ##########
// === GENERATED by mtgish-tooling from the mtgish oracle IR (predictive, approximate). ===
// Complete render — no manual wiring needed. Still review the rules text and add a passing
// scenario test before relying on it.

package com.wingedsheep.mtg.sets.generated.demo.cards

import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Keyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.core.Subtype
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.dsl.card
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.model.Rarity
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GameObjectFilter
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.GrantKeyword
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.ModifyStats
import com.wingedsheep.sdk.scripting.filters.unified.GroupFilter


/**
 * Howlpack Resurgence
 * {2}{G}
 * Enchantment
 * Flash
 * Each creature you control that's a Wolf or a Werewolf gets +1/+1 and has trample.
 */
val HowlpackResurgence = card("Howlpack Resurgence") {
    manaCost = "{2}{G}"
    colorIdentity = "G"
    typeLine = "Enchantment"
    oracleText = "Flash\nEach creature you control that's a Wolf or a Werewolf gets +1/+1 and has trample."
    keywords(Keyword.FLASH)
    staticAbility {
        ability = ModifyStats(
            powerBonus = 1,
            toughnessBonus = 1,
            filter = GroupFilter(
                GameObjectFilter.Creature.withAnyOfSubtypes(listOf(Subtype.WOLF, Subtype.WEREWOLF)).youControl()
            )
        )
    }
    staticAbility {
        ability = GrantKeyword(
            Keyword.TRAMPLE,
            GroupFilter(
                GameObjectFilter.Creature.withAnyOfSubtypes(listOf(Subtype.WOLF, Subtype.WEREWOLF)).youControl()
            )
        )
    }
    metadata {
        rarity = Rarity.UNCOMMON
        collectorNumber = "204"
        artist = "Izzy"
        flavorText = "The renewed howling of werewolves announced the end of the Cursemute—and the beginning of Avacyn's madness."
        imageUri = "https://cards.scryfall.io/normal/front/c/0/c0dc4c08-ed18-454b-b061-8901c253005c.jpg"
    }
}
